pending_context.whisper: Purdus Jones
pending_context.notes: Lines 275, 279: "everybody called my mother Vic, matter of fact when she passed away, and they had the name Purdus Jones." Raw consistently uses "Purdus" not "Pertus"; "Verdis" is a documented southern Black female given name and the consistent "Vic" nickname fits. Pass 1/2 mistakenly transcribed as "Pertus" — the actual Whisper output is "Purdus." Flag for adversarial.

pending_context.whisper: satisfying to Brown
pending_context.notes: Lines 6499, 6523: Jones discusses Bobby Brown and Stokely as a PAIR who were "way back in the early days of Snick" and both "wanted to be the top gun." This SNCC-leadership-aspirant pairing strongly suggests **H. Rap Brown** (Jamil Al-Amin) — who succeeded Carmichael as SNCC chairman in 1967 — not a local Arkansas Black-Power figure. Promotes the previously-flagged "Bobby Brown" from "Little Rock local figure" interpretation to "H. Rap Brown" interpretation. Demote the speaker-originating "Robert Brown" interpretation; promote H. Rap Brown candidate. Resolution still has residual uncertainty (Jones could be conflating two figures), so retain adversarial flag at medium.

pending_context.whisper: He's an attorney in Leroy / health clinic in Mariana / Bill Clinton appointed him on a stand as a federal judge
pending_context.notes: Lines 5067, 5083, 5087: SEPARATE Clinton-appointment reference from the earlier (line 2955) Pine Bluff attorney. This second figure ran a Marianna AR health clinic and was an attorney in "Leroy" (likely Lee County / Leland AR). Strong candidate: **Olly Neal Jr.** (1941– ), Marianna AR civil-rights attorney, founder of the Lee County Cooperative Clinic (the canonical "Mariana health clinic"), later Arkansas Court of Appeals judge. However: Neal was a *state* Court of Appeals judge (Clinton-appointed, 1996), not a *federal* judge. Jones's "federal" claim is either a speaker-memory error or refers to a different Marianna figure. Flag for adversarial.

pending_context.whisper: Brian Warmac / Mr. Walmart
pending_context.notes: Pass 1 row 57.20 and Pass 2 row 57.P2.8 treated these as two names; raw SRT confirms they ARE two distinct people (lines 467, 1303): "Mr. Walmart" gave Jones's father a plow; "Brian Warmac" tried to discourage Jones's mother from supporting his SNCC work. Confirm both as separate Williamsville AR figures. Both speaker-originating.

pending_context.whisper: a, a, a, Navy, the Navy base or something
pending_context.notes: Lines 5723, 5727: Speaker says "Navy" but the only large military facility in Pine Bluff AR is the **Pine Bluff Arsenal** (US Army chemical-weapons depot, opened 1941). Speaker-memory error confusing Army/Navy. The "big, big military" + "hiring a lot of people" + "common labor" description matches Pine Bluff Arsenal's WW2-era and Cold-War-era workforce. Promote with retained adversarial flag for audio re-listen confirmation.

pending_context.whisper: dearer and goo, this dearer
pending_context.notes: Line 4783: "later they was dearer and goo, this dearer" — the doubled "dearer…this dearer" rendering suggests the figure's surname is "Dear" or "Deere" or "Deere-Coe" (paired with another figure named "Goo" / "Coe" / "Gould"). Pass 3 flagged this for adversarial; Pass 4 raw spot-check confirms the doubled-name pattern. Retain adversarial flag.

pending_context.whisper: Johnson Man came out of it
pending_context.candidate_correction: (the canonical figure Johnson out of Arkansas City AR Black school district)
pending_context.notes: Line 1059: "Johnson Man came out of it" referring to the second of Arkansas's two all-Black school districts. Speaker is naming a notable Arkansas City alum. Possible candidates: James Weldon Johnson (no — wrong era), or a state-level figure. Flag for adversarial — Arkansas City AR all-Black school district alumni roster cross-reference needed.

coverage_flag_legend.P-NN: Partial read covered NN% of bytes

inferential_uncertainty.formula_reference: transcripts/pass10_rescore.py (LoC verification retires audit-process noise; score = categorical + (1 - NOISE_RETIRE*loc_match)*noise; 2026-05-30)

pass9_metadata.credit_formula: match_factor * min(0.10, max(0, 0.02 + 0.001*healed - 0.005*fails)); credit = 0 if healed=0 or match<0.3
